title: Kenyan Smoked Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring smoky chicken kebabs.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of paprika, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Kenyan spices, coconut oil, lime juice, garlic, ginger, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto metal or bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
